title: Chapter 40
content:
Chapter 40: Chapter 40: Mio And Mia’s Power Up

With his new amount of points, Damon began pondering.

’What should I do with my point? I need to save 100,000 points for my cultivation to peak True Spirit Realm, while over 300,000 looks a lot, but the cost of upgrading will become more expensive the further I go into cultivation.’

’System, you said the cost of my advancement will be lessened if I upgrade my spiritual roots to heaven grade. How much is it?’

[It costs 100,000 lust points to upgrade to heaven-grade spiritual roots. and each level will cost 50,000 lust points.]

’So, to reach the peak, it will cost me 300.000. Damn, how much will it cost when it’s above heaven grade?’

[Host doesn’t need to worry too much. Lust Harem system is connected to your Incubus lord, so once it reaches earth grade, the system will go on update to adjust the lust point. For now, the system recommends the host to gather as much as possible and reach the Earth Spirit Realm.]

’I see, then, how much the Earth Grade Spiritual Root Advancement Pill?’

[Spiritual Root Advancement Pill, Earth Grade - Flawless will cost you 5000 lust points.]

’Buy six of them.’

[You bought six Earth Grade Spiritual Root Advancement Pill - Flawless Purity, -30,000 lust points.]

’With this, I have enough to upgrade Mio, Mia, and Ariel’s spiritual roots to peak earth grade.’

’That’s it for now, even though I upgrade more, I’ve been in only two fights, one for the test and one for that useless man. At the Fire Valley, I should be able to test my arsenal.’

Then he woke the twins,

"Wake up, you two, I want to give you something."

"Hmm... what is Damon?" Mio actually fell asleep when Damon was busy with the system, while Mia opened her eyes immediately.

They move into a seated position, and Damon gives them the pills.

"What is it, Damon?" Mio looks at the pill with curiosity. Mia just takes it without any question.

"Those pills are Earth Grade Spiritual Root Advancement Pill; they will advance your spiritual roots to peak level." Damon said with a serious look.

"What? Where do you get it? Do you know it’s rare, right? It needs at least a master alchemist to make it, and it doesn’t even reach high purity? How do—" Mio asks Damon a barrage of questions, but Mia cuts her off.

"Big Sister! We promise Damon not to ask, remember? Besides, he did it for us, I don’t think he will give us something bad." Mia raised her voice a little bit.

"Oh... You’re right..." Her expression changed because of Mia’s scolding.

"Hahaha." Looking at them, Damon just laughed.

’Their trait really didn’t lie. Mio acts like a big sister leading everything, but her airhead trait makes me sometimes forget that she is the big sister.’

’Meanwhile, Mia’s shyness made her be dragged everywhere by her sister, but her intelligence didn’t make her look like a little sister.’

"It’s okay, just trust me, you two are now my women. Just trust me, I’ll always do what’s best for my women. Go ahead, you can eat it."

"Hmm," the girls answer with a nod. The move into a cross-legged position and eat the pills.

He could see that the surrounding spiritual energy began to gather around them. After a few minutes the finish refining the pills.

"Come here." Damon spread his arms and invited them into his embrace.

Mia calmly came to his embrace while Mio jump to him.

"Next one going to be a little hurt, can you guys handle it?" Damon asks them in his embrace.

"Yes, I think so..." Mia replied, feeling Damon’s strong touch on her back.

"Of course, I can," Mio replied, with full confidence.

Hearing their reply, Damon began to work.

’System, transfer their bloodline and physique.’

Then, a powerful stream of energy erupted from his hands, falling over their body.

"Mmph... Ahhh!" A tremor spread through their delicate, sexy body, a groan of pain turning into a grunt of agony as every piece of their body seemed to be broken.

Damon felt his heart heavy at this; he had seen it with Ariel. All he could do now was hug them tightly as they went through this.

****

Hours passed in a moment, Mio’s and Mia’s panting breaths coming together as they were exhausted, their sweaty body fell, and their head resting on Damon’s chest.

[Void Sniper Bloodline was successfully integrated into Mio Nightrider.]

[Void Sniper Physique was successfully integrated into Mio Nightrider.]

[Shadow Queen Bloodline was successfully integrated into Mia Nightrider.]

[Shadow Queen Physique was successfully integrated into Mia Nightrider.]

"Are you two, okay?" Damon asked them in a worried voice.

"Hmm, I’m fine," Mia replied to him.

"Damon, isn’t thi—" Mio about to question again, but Damon sealed her lips with a kiss.

"There’s more to come in the future. For now, let’s take a bath and rest." Mio nodded obediently. Then he turned his face toward Mia and kissed her also.

"You did great." Hearing praise for Damon, a wide smile appeared on her face.

They got up and went straight into the bath still buck naked.

They washed up and went into a large hot tub. The tub is big as it fit three of them, Mia on his right and Mio on his left.

While they are relaxing in the tub, Damon checks the twins’ new status.

[Name: Mio Nightrider]

[Age: 23]

[Cultivation: Earth Spirit Realm - Fifth Level]

[Relationship: In Love]

[Interest: 550/1000]

[Chastity: Claim By Damon Arcknight]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Dark: 60, Bow: 50]

[Spiritual Roots: Void Spiritual Roots] [Earth Grade - Peak]

[Bloodline: Blood of Void Sniper]

[Physique: Body of Void Sniper]

[Traits: Cheerful, Natural Archer, Loyal, Airhead, Doting Big-Sister]

[Name: Mia Nightrider]

[Age: 23]

[Cultivation: Earth Spirit Realm - Fifth Level]

[Relationship: In Love]

[Interest: 740/1000]

[Chastity: Claim By Damon Arcknight]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Dark: 60, Dagger: 50]

[Spiritual Roots: Shadow Spiritual Roots] [Earth Grade - Peak]

[Bloodline: Blood of Shadow Queen]

[Physique: Body of Shadow Queen]

[Traits: Shy, Natural Assassin, Loyal, Intelligent, Close Pervert, Masochist]
